title: [Epic] Increase pkg/server Authentication & Admin API Test Coverage
body: Increase the test coverage for critical authentication, MFA, administrative limits, and subdomain security APIs in `pkg/server/api.go` to ensure stability and secure edge case handling.

issues.title: Add test coverage for MFA handlers & session resolution
issues.body: Write unit tests for `handleMFAEnable` (37.5%), `handleMFAVerify` (46.7%), `handleMFADisable` (50.0%), and `getCurrentUserOrToken` (14.3%). Test valid/invalid TOTP codes, active/expired bearer tokens, cookie-based session fallbacks, and error reporting.

issues.title: Add test coverage for Admin overrides & user deletion
issues.body: Write unit tests for `handleAdminOverrideTunnelsLimit` (22.7%) and `handleAdminDeleteUser` (44.4%). Test payload validation edge cases, database transactions, audit logging triggers, and preventing deletion of the owner role.

issues.title: Add test coverage for Subdomain Access Control & Custom Headers
issues.body: Write unit tests for `handleUpdateReservationAccessControl` (48.1%) and `handleUpdateReservationHeaders` (48.3%). Verify passcode hashing validation, IP whitelist format checks, and custom HTTP proxy header validations.

issues.title: Add test coverage for Invitation & Registration flows
issues.body: Write unit tests for `handleCreateInvitation` (45.5%), `handleDeleteInvitation` (38.9%), and `handleCSRSignInvitation` (45.9%). Verify invitation expiration checks, admin permission checks, and CSR format rejection tests.
